items.briefing:
China-linked cyber spies have been targeting university email servers running Roundcube, which is relevant to Australian higher education institutions that may use similar systems. Separately, a job scam is circulating that impersonates major brands to steal marketing professionals' Google account credentials — staff should be cautious of unsolicited job offers asking them to sign in anywhere. A Telstra mobile outage has also disrupted services across Australia today, so if you're experiencing connectivity issues, this is likely the cause rather than a security incident.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected job offer with a link to "sign in with Google," do not click it — verify directly with the supposed sender before entering any credentials.

featured.title: Telstra mobile outage disrupts services across Australia
featured.quote: Major Telstra outage disrupted voice and data services nationwide, affecting millions of Australians.
